title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Enlil in the Ekur
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enlil in the Ekur.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enlil in the Ekur.

translation.text: From 'Enlil in the Ekur': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
